Fig. 42–15.The excess radius may be different for circles with different orientations.
Fig. 42–16.An accelerating rocket ship with two clocks.
Fig. 42–17.A clock at the head of an accelerating rocket ship appears to run faster than a clock at the tail.
Fig. 42–18.Trying to make a rectangle in space-time.
Fig. 42–19.In a uniform gravitational field the trajectory with the maximum proper time for a fixed elapsed time is a parabola.
